AI WebGPU Lab Org

ai-webgpu-lab/.github Community Files Audit

The organization `.github` repository owns issue templates, the PR template, the org profile, CODEOWNERS, and the contributing rules. This page audits the inventory and produces a schema-aligned baseline for the org-wide template surface.

Audit Controls

Run the audit to confirm the org community file inventory is complete and stable.

Community Inventory

    Metrics

    Environment

    Fixture

    Schema-Aligned Result Draft

    {
  "status": "pending"
}

    Audit Notes

    • The fixture lists the issue forms, PR template, profile sections, and contributing sections that consumers expect.
    • The audit emits a single org-level result so any drift in the template surface lands in `reports/raw/` like every other readiness baseline.
    • Real reviewers should keep this fixture updated when the org adds or retires a template.
